Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Fallen Sword]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 10''' — Fallen Sword is a codename used by Sola.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 16''' — The Fallen Sword is a tall figure wearing gray powered armor with a reflective green visor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 16''' — The Fallen Sword is currently raiding an Iron Legion Hive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 17''' — Fallen Sword is a name or title used by civilians to address Sola.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 18''' — The Fallen Sword is an independent agent with a personal crusade against the Iron Legion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 18''' — The Fallen Sword is a famous individual.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 19''' — The Fallen Sword is a title held by Sola.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 43''' — The Fallen Sword is equipped with an Aethertech weapon.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 21''' — Queen Shyrax intends to sharpen the Fallen Sword.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 21''' — Sola Kalter is known as the Fallen Sword.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 10''' — Shyrax addresses Fallen Sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 14''' — Fallen Sword is a title or name used by an interlocutor with Sola.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 25''' — The Fallen Sword is a character or entity that can be sent to Omega.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 26''' — The Fallen Sword is dedicated to killing the Iron Legion.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
